violations.text: The doors to the outside (doors and garage door(s)), located in the loading dock area, are not tight-fitting (gaps at the base). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Trapped/dead mice were observed in the following areas: - 1 mouse in snap trap in the warehouse kitchen area - 2 mice on glue trap in loading dock area near middle garage door Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests. (Mouse was removed from the kitchen area at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

Several ice machines and ice wells in the concession's areas are lacking an air gap (currently equipped with an air break): - Ice machine drainpipes observed resting onto or into the floor drain - Ice well drain tubes observed resting onto the floor drain To prevent possible contamination between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed, the drainpipes/tubes are to be adjusted to allow for a gap between the end of the drain and the floor drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Droppings were observed in areas of the warehouse kitchen and concession's kitchens under/behind equipment. Concessions areas are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to aid in the current pest control program. (Cleaning completed at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
The concession stands do not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

Various items in the refrigeration in the concession stands were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood ventilation system has an accumulation of oil/other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
